channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Brain foods that may help prevent dementia
How to identify bugs and their bites
Erector spinae plane blocks may not provide meaningful benefit over standard analgesia in breast surgery patients
item.description: Erector spinae plane blocks reduced opioid use in recovery and shortened PACU stay slightly, but did not offer a clinically significant benefit.

item.title: What is cyclosporiasis? The parasite behind the latest outbreak
item.description: Health officials are investigating a multistate outbreak of this parasitic intestinal infection. Learn what it is, how it spreads, and symptoms.
